---
title: "Publicações"
listing:
  id: publications-listing
  contents:
    - publications-data.yml
  template: _publication-listing.ejs.md
  sort: "year desc"
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  field-types:
    year: number
---

```{=html}
<div class="pub-filters" aria-label="Filtros de publicações">
  <div class="pub-filters__group">
    <label for="pub-year-filter">Ano</label>
    <select id="pub-year-filter">
      <option value="">Todos</option>
    </select>
  </div>

  <div class="pub-filters__group">
    <label for="pub-theme-filter">Tema</label>
    <select id="pub-theme-filter">
      <option value="">Todos</option>
    </select>
  </div>

  <div class="pub-filters__group">
    <label for="pub-subtheme-filter">Subtema</label>
    <select id="pub-subtheme-filter">
      <option value="">Todos</option>
    </select>
  </div>

  <p class="pub-filters__status" id="pub-filters-status" aria-live="polite"></p>
</div>

<p class="pub-empty-state" id="pub-empty-state" hidden>Nenhum item corresponde aos filtros selecionados.</p>
```

::: {#publications-listing}
:::

```{=html}
<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
  const items = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(".pub-item"));
  const groups = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(".pub-year-group"));
  const yearFilter = document.getElementById("pub-year-filter");
  const themeFilter = document.getElementById("pub-theme-filter");
  const subthemeFilter = document.getElementById("pub-subtheme-filter");
  const status = document.getElementById("pub-filters-status");
  const emptyState = document.getElementById("pub-empty-state");

  if (!items.length || !yearFilter || !themeFilter || !subthemeFilter || !status || !emptyState) {
    return;
  }

  const years = [...new Set(items
    .map((item) => item.dataset.year)
    .filter((value) => value)
  )].sort((a, b) => Number(b) - Number(a));

  const themes = [...new Set(items
    .flatMap((item) => (item.dataset.themeValues || "")
      .split("|")
      .map((value) => value.trim())
      .filter((value) => value))
  )].sort((a, b) => a.localeCompare(b, "pt-BR"));

  const subthemes = [...new Set(items
    .flatMap((item) => (item.dataset.subthemeValues || "")
      .split("|")
      .map((value) => value.trim())
      .filter((value) => value))
  )].sort((a, b) => a.localeCompare(b, "pt-BR"));

  years.forEach((year) => {
    const option = document.createElement("option");
    option.value = year;
    option.textContent = year;
    yearFilter.appendChild(option);
  });

  themes.forEach((theme) => {
    const option = document.createElement("option");
    option.value = theme;
    option.textContent = theme;
    themeFilter.appendChild(option);
  });

  subthemes.forEach((subtheme) => {
    const option = document.createElement("option");
    option.value = subtheme;
    option.textContent = subtheme;
    subthemeFilter.appendChild(option);
  });

  const applyFilters = () => {
    const selectedYear = yearFilter.value;
    const selectedTheme = themeFilter.value;
    const selectedSubtheme = subthemeFilter.value;
    let visibleCount = 0;

    items.forEach((item) => {
      const matchesYear = !selectedYear || item.dataset.year === selectedYear;
      const itemThemes = (item.dataset.themeValues || "")
        .split("|")
        .map((value) => value.trim())
        .filter((value) => value);
      const itemSubthemes = (item.dataset.subthemeValues || "")
        .split("|")
        .map((value) => value.trim())
        .filter((value) => value);
      const matchesTheme = !selectedTheme || itemThemes.includes(selectedTheme);
      const matchesSubtheme = !selectedSubtheme || itemSubthemes.includes(selectedSubtheme);
      const visible = matchesYear && matchesTheme && matchesSubtheme;

      item.hidden = !visible;
      if (visible) {
        visibleCount += 1;
      }
    });

    groups.forEach((group) => {
      const hasVisibleItems = group.querySelector(".pub-item:not([hidden])");
      group.hidden = !hasVisibleItems;
    });

    status.textContent = `Mostrando ${visibleCount} de ${items.length} itens`;
    emptyState.hidden = visibleCount !== 0;
  };

  yearFilter.addEventListener("change", applyFilters);
  themeFilter.addEventListener("change", applyFilters);
  subthemeFilter.addEventListener("change", applyFilters);
  applyFilters();
});
</script>
```
